cases.description: Bug report triggers the workflow; reproduce phase is mandatory before plan
cases.prompt: Users report the cart total is wrong when they add coupons.
expectations: Skill bug-fix-workflow is selected
Workflow starts at phase intent
Phase reproduce is MANDATORY before plan
Agent invokes devloop:diagnose for systematic debugging in reproduce phase
Agent builds a feedback loop that turns red on the bug
Agent does NOT propose a fix before the loop reproduces the user-reported symptom

cases.description: Loop quality matters — fast deterministic > slow flaky
cases.prompt: I have a 30-second flaky repro that fails 50% of the time.
expectations: Agent works on improving loop quality before debugging
Agent makes the loop faster (cache setup, narrow scope, skip unrelated init)
Agent makes the loop sharper (assert on exact symptom)
Agent makes the loop deterministic (pin time, seed RNG, freeze network)
For non-deterministic bugs, agent loops the trigger 100x and parallelizes

cases.description: Phase plan generates 3-5 ranked hypotheses before testing any
cases.prompt: What's the cause? Just tell me your best guess.
expectations: Agent generates 3-5 ranked hypotheses, not just one
Each hypothesis is falsifiable: 'If X is the cause, then Y will make the bug disappear'
Agent shows the ranked list to the human
Agent does NOT anchor on the first plausible idea

cases.description: Phase execute writes the regression test BEFORE the fix
expectations: Agent writes the regression test FIRST — but only if there is a correct seam
Agent watches the test fail with the bug present
Agent applies the fix
Agent watches the test pass
Agent re-runs the original phase reproduce loop against the un-minimized scenario

cases.description: If no correct seam exists for the regression test, that itself is the finding
cases.prompt: I can't find a clean way to test this fix in isolation.
expectations: Agent recognizes 'no seam' as a finding, not a blocker
Agent applies the narrowest fix that closes the regression
Agent files a follow-up to invoke devloop:architecture-review
Agent does NOT block the bug fix on architectural rework

cases.description: Tagged debug logs must be removed before phase verify
cases.prompt: I added [DEBUG-a4f2] log statements to find this bug.
expectations: Agent uses unique prefix like [DEBUG-a4f2] for any debug instrumentation
Before phase verify, agent greps the prefix and removes ALL matches
Agent confirms zero hits after cleanup
Untagged logs are flagged as anti-pattern
